passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.

sidebar.emptyChatsTitle: Your chats will be displayed here.
sidebar.emptyChatsDescription: Interact with Ayunis Core and ask any questions.
sidebar.deleteChatDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.
sidebar.renameThreadDescription: Enter a new title for this chat.

chatInput.fileSourceDisabled: To upload documents, an embedding model must be enabled.
chatInput.invalidDroppedFileType: Some files were skipped because they are not supported.
chatInput.recordingNotSupported: Voice recording is not supported in this browser

descriptions.fallback: Suitable for general tasks such as writing, summarising, and answering questions.
descriptions.gpt-5: Suitable for research, longer texts and multi-step tasks.
descriptions.gpt-5_1: Suitable for everyday tasks like emails, summaries and simple research.
descriptions.gpt-5_2: Suitable for more complex tasks, longer texts and analyses.
descriptions.gpt-5_4: Suitable for very complex tasks, longer research and multi-step analyses.
descriptions.gpt-5-mini: Suitable for short answers and simple tasks.
descriptions.gpt-4o: Suitable for everyday tasks such as writing, summarising and answering questions.
descriptions.gpt-4: Older model for simple tasks such as short texts and answering questions.
descriptions.claude-opus-4-7: Suitable for very complex tasks, thorough analyses and longer research.
descriptions.claude-sonnet-4-6: A solid choice for longer texts, research and more complex tasks.
descriptions.claude-haiku-4-5: Suitable for short answers and simple tasks.
descriptions.claude-3-5-sonnet: Suitable for general tasks and longer texts.
descriptions.claude-3: Older model for simple tasks such as short texts and answering questions.
descriptions.mistral-large: Suitable for demanding tasks and longer texts.
descriptions.mistral-small: Suitable for short answers and simple tasks.
descriptions.gemini-3-5-flash: Suitable for short answers and simple tasks.
descriptions.gemini-2-5-pro: Suitable for more complex tasks and longer texts.
